rationale: 8 hits found (threshold >=1 fails). 'Just Rephrase It!' (arxiv 2405.13907) is an exact functional twin (paraphrase-cycle for uncertainty). CISC + Cycles of Thought + RASC fully cover confidence-weighted/cyclic self-consistency. The alpha^k logit decay + lowest-confidence inversion is a trivial selection-rule flip on existing paraphrase-confidence machinery — does not constitute novelty.
